name: ttareungi-radar
description: Saved-place bike availability radar prototype for Seoul public bike users.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run app:prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check scripts/build-station-stats.js && node --check scripts/fetch-latest-daily-usage.js && node --check scripts/prepare-capacitor-web.js && node --check scripts/build-android-debug.js
